top_signals.title: Ceasefire Uncertainty Remains the Biggest Driver for Oil Markets
top_signals.summary: Iran is reviewing the latest U.S. ceasefire proposal, raising hopes of a truce extension and tempering oil prices as traders weigh the risk of renewed Middle East disruptions. Ukraine’s Refinery War Gives Russian Crude an Export Passport - Ukraine is inadvertently pushing increasing amounts of Russian crude into the export markets as Kyiv’s intensified drone strikes on Russia’s downstream assets free up more oil. - Russia’s seaborne exports in 2026 to date have averaged 3.46 million b/d, the highest pace of loadings since…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: France restricts Israeli presence at Europe’s biggest defense show
top_signals.summary: The restrictions come amid strained relations between Paris and Jerusalem over Israel’s military operations in Lebanon.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump names housing chief Bill Pulte acting intelligence director, replacing Tulsi Gabbard
top_signals.summary: Pulte has alleged wrongdoing related to mortgages against Trump's foes, Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook and New York Attorney General Letitia James.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: UAE’s Strait of Hormuz Pipeline Bypass May Also Include Fuels
top_signals.summary: The United Arab Emirates is considering building an additional pipeline for refined products that would bypass the Strait of Hormuz and carry fuels to the country’s east coast.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Blue Owl Tech Private Credit Fund Is Selling $300 Million Bonds
top_signals.summary: A private credit fund managed by Blue Owl Capital Inc. is looking to sell $300 million of investment-grade bonds, according to a person familiar with the matter.

top_signals.title: Chinese sports brand Li Ning partners with NBA star Steph Curry
